finding: EA-schema fingerprint of squashed real-tree set is byte-IDENTICAL to .extraction/baseline/schema.fp (validator re-runs on both DBs); build-DB server-owned schema also identical (only expected desktop tables extra).
EA-seed canonical image of squashed set EQUIVALENT to baseline (21 seeded tables, business-key keyed, FK-through-business-key, element-sorted arrays).

pg_dump round-trips VARCHAR `col IN(...)` CHECK non-idempotently on PG18 -> 27 constraints diverged under pg_get_constraintdef. Rewrote to the original IN() fixed-point (T-3), NOT a fingerprint tweak. Re-check: fingerprint IDENTICAL.

N9 auth-domain purity: grep of auth migrations returns ZERO permission strings other than profile::*/'*' (was: mig1 seeded chat::, mig27 seeded the full domain list). Domain grants moved to owning modules.
Seed rows expose no secrets: *_encrypted bytea columns are NULL in seed data and are dropped from the seed compare regardless; no api keys/tokens in any seeded row.
All 88 tables + 3 functions + 15 triggers + 2 sequences + 2 extensions placed; the splitter aborts on any unmapped DDL statement (0 unmapped). No schema object lost in the reshape.
All 139 FKs deferred to a post-schema version band; squashed set applies on a FRESH DB with zero errors (no forward-reference), proving the monotonic-counter ordering is FK-topologically valid.

compose_merged_migrations() globs module dirs + guards basename collisions (panic). migrations-merged regenerates; runtime sqlx::migrate! unchanged. cargo check -p ziee / -p ziee-desktop / sdk --workspace all exit 0 (query! verified vs merged + auth-only DBs).

user_group_mcp_servers seed FK-references groups.id + mcp_servers.id (both gen_random_uuid). Kept literal ids consistent by sourcing all three rows from the same pg_dump image; groups permissions cleaned in place. Seed compare resolves FK-via-business-key -> EQUIVALENT.

Tooling proven deterministic (numeric baseline applied to two fresh DBs -> identical fp + seed) AND discriminating (drop-column, alter-gen-expr, add-perm all DETECTED; perm-array reorder NOT false-failed). See GATE_PROOF.md.
All 91 files follow <YYYYMMDDNNNN>_<module>_<desc>.sql with a unique monotonic counter; bootstrap(0001) < auth(0050) < module schema(0100+) < fkeys(4000+) < data(4500+) < perm grants(6000+).
Each table lands in its owning module's migrations/ (N7). Auth self-contained (redefines shared trigger fn for the standalone AUTH_MIGRATOR / auth-only build DB path).

Golden: types.ui.ts + types.desktop.ts BYTE-IDENTICAL; openapi.ui.json + openapi.desktop.json CANONICALLY-EQUAL to baseline (migrations are not in the API surface). Regenerated files restored via git checkout.
